overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character walking along a snowy shoreline beneath a dramatic red sky. The character progresses from a narrow rocky canyon into an open waterfront area with distant ruined structures visible across the dark water.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy canyon path beside dark water

agents.ego_description: armored character with circular shield on back walking steadily along the snowy shoreline path

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall covered in snow forming the left boundary of the passage
dark reflective body of water running alongside the path
large ruined fortress structure visible on the horizon across the water
snowy ground with patches of exposed rock and ice
snow-dusted rocks along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy canyon with a high rock wall on the left and dark water on the right. The sky glows deep red, and a distant ruined castle is visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between enclosed canyon and open shore

events.description: rocky cliff face recedes into the distance as the path opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoreline as the environment opens up, revealing more of the snowy landscape

entered.detail: gentle snow-covered hillside replacing the vertical cliff face

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wider passage as the left cliff recedes into the distance. The distant castle becomes more prominent as the character advances along the snowy shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy shoreline with expansive water views

events.description: emerging fully into open terrain with unobstructed views of the water and distant ruins

agents.ego_description: walking across the open snowfield toward the distant ruined structure, with the landscape now fully opened on the left

entered.detail: expansive flat snow-covered terrain stretching to the horizon
rocky edge where snow meets the dark water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open area with expansive views of the dark water and the ruined castle now prominently visible ahead. The enclosing cliffs have completely receded, revealing open snowy plains to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from a claustrophobic snowy canyon into a vast, open waterfront landscape under a deep red sky. It begins with the character walking along a narrow shore, flanked by a towering rock wall on the left and dark water on the right. As the character advances, the canyon gradually widens and the left cliff recedes, bringing a distant ruined castle into clearer focus. The scene then expands fully as the enclosing walls disappear, revealing expansive snowy plains to the left and a wide view of the dark water. Finally, the camera emerges into a completely open area where the ruined castle stands prominently ahead against the glowing horizon.
